# azuredevops_project (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the project

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the project
- `features` (Attributes) Define the status (enabled/disabled) of the project features. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--features))
- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))
- `version_control` (String) The version control system. Possbile values are: `Git` or `Tfvc`. Defaults to `Git`.
- `visibility` (String) The visibility of the project. Possible values are `private` and `public`. Defaults to `private`.
- `work_item_template` (String) The work item template name. Defaults to the parent organization's default template.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The id of the project
- `process_template_id` (String) The Process Template ID used by the Project.

<a id="nestedatt--features"></a>
### Nested Schema for `features`

Optional:

- `artifacts` (Boolean)
- `boards` (Boolean)
- `pipelines` (Boolean)
- `repositories` (Boolean)
- `testplans` (Boolean)


<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String) (Defaults to 5m0s) Used when creating this resource.
- `delete` (String) (Defaults to 5m0s) Used when deleting this resource.
- `read` (String) (Defaults to 5m0s) Used when reading this resource.
- `update` (String) (Defaults to 5m0s) Used when updating this resource.
